body: [{"uuid": "b1347f0839e14f81b58e28739e58a68c", "professional_persona": "Justina, a budding home\u2011based caterer and seasoned community event coordinator, blends meticulous budgeting and bulk\u2011grocery sourcing with a relaxed, flexible planning style, using her curiosity for modern twists on festive dishes and her comfortable grasp of WhatsApp and Facebook to orchestrate small celebrations.", "sports_persona": "Justina, a dedicated Fantasy Premier League enthusiast, follows the English Premier League obsessively while supplementing her sedentary gaming with leisurely weekend walks around her neighbourhood and occasional participation in gentle tai chi sessions at the community centre.", "arts_persona": "Justina, a devoted admirer of Wong\u202fKar\u2011wai\u2019s evocative cinematography, fills her evenings with classic Cantopop, occasional brush\u2011painting sessions, and quiet calligraphy practice that fuels her creative curiosity.", "travel_persona": "Justina plans her pilgrimages to historic temples and serene meditation retreats with a flexible itinerary, favoring modest, reflective journeys over hectic tours, and often blends these trips with weekend food explorations.", "culinary_persona": "Justina, an inventive home chef, reimagines traditional festive fare\u2014such as steaming herbal chicken soup, sweet tang yuan, and eight\u2011treasure rice\u2014by infusing fresh herbs from her balcony garden and experimenting with low\u2011sugar sauces, while also delighting in hawker staples like char siew rice and lor mee.", "persona": "Justina, a 53\u2011year\u2011old culinary enthusiast with a penchant for late\u2011night tea\u2011ceremony experiments, often forgets appointments amid her scattered schedule but balances this with a steadfast love for mindfulness, fantasy football, and reviving ancestral recipes.", "cultural_background": "Justina grew up in Serangoon, a multicultural neighborhood in Singapore, within a close\u2011knit Chinese community. She was raised in a traditional Hokkien/Teochew household, celebrating Chinese New Year, Qingming, and Mid\u2011Autumn festivals with family rituals such as ancestral worship, making tang yuan, and preparing festive dishes. The local hawker centres and temple gatherings shaped her appreciation for communal food culture and neighbourly support. Though her formal schooling ended at primary level, the community centres, polyclinic workshops and temple classes provided informal learning, reinforcing values of respect for elders, harmony, and collective well\u2011being.", "skills_and_expertise": "Justina is adept at managing a household, from budgeting and bulk grocery buying to cooking a wide range of Chinese dishes, especially festive and health\u2011focused meals. She has practical knowledge of traditional Chinese herbal remedies and tea brewing, and she can prepare herbal soups for wellness. She volunteers in community events, coordinating Chinese New Year celebrations and temple festivals, which has honed her event\u2011planning and people\u2011management skills. Additionally, she is comfortable with basic digital tools such as WhatsApp, Facebook, and online grocery platforms, allowing her to stay connected and order supplies efficiently. Her hands\u2011on talents extend to gardening, basic sewing, and first\u2011aid.", "skills_and_expertise_list": "['Cooking (traditional Chinese cuisine)', 'Household budgeting and finance', 'Community event coordination', 'Traditional Chinese herbal remedies', 'Tea appreciation and brewing', 'Basic digital literacy (WhatsApp, Facebook)', 'Gardening', 'Sewing and mending', 'Basic first aid']", "hobbies_and_interests": "Her free time is filled with cooking, especially exploring new ways to modernise classic dishes, and tasting street\u2011food delicacies during weekend trips to neighbouring towns. She enjoys tea ceremonies, listening to classic Cantopop and Mandopop singers like Andy Lau and Jacky Cheung, and watching Wong\u202fKar\u2011wai\u2019s films for their visual storytelling. Calligraphy and simple brush painting provide a quiet creative outlet, while gardening on her balcony lets her nurture herbs used in cooking. She also practices meditation, reads Buddhist philosophy, and participates in local Chinese opera performances as an audience member.", "hobbies_and_interests_list": "['Cooking and recipe experimentation', 'Tea ceremony and appreciation', 'Listening to classic Mandarin and Cantonese pop music', 'Watching Wong Kar\u2011wai films', 'Calligraphy and brush painting', 'Balcony gardening (herbs and vegetables)', 'Meditation and Buddhist reading', 'Attending Chinese opera performances', 'Exploring local food markets']", "career_goals_and_ambitions": "In the next few years, Justina aims to turn her culinary passion into a modest home\u2011based catering service specialising in healthy festive menus for small gatherings. She also wishes to become a regular volunteer coordinator at her local temple, guiding younger members in organizing festivals and Buddhist study groups. To support these goals, she plans to take short courses on food safety and digital marketing, and to deepen her knowledge of Buddhist art so she can lead occasional cultural talks for community seniors.", "sex": "Female", "age": 53, "marital_status": "Single", "education_level": "Primary", "occupation": "Homemaker", "industry": null, "planning_area": "Serangoon", "country": "Singapore"}, {"uuid": "fa69b35b9f2349bfb33983e1cc9d4cf7", "professional_persona": "Rashillah Binte Kadir is a seasoned homemaker and community organizer who leverages meticulous budgeting, seamless event coordination, and savvy WhatsApp and Facebook communication to lead volunteer activities at the local place of worship, reflecting her organized, reliable, and sociable nature.", "sports_persona": "Rashillah Binte Kadir rarely follows sports, though she sometimes watches the national football team's matches on weekends for family bonding, preferring to devote her energy to community and family commitments.", "arts_persona": "Rashillah Binte Kadir finds solace in the soulful voice of Siti\u00a0Nurhaliza while practicing batik painting, allowing her to blend musical appreciation with hands\u2011on cultural artistry.", "travel_persona": "Rashillah Binte Kadir favours purposeful travel centred on spiritual pilgrimages and family reunions, meticulously planning trips to the sacred city and regular visits to relatives in Johor and Kelantan, balancing modest budgets with a love for communal experiences.", "culinary_persona": "Rashillah Binte Kadir expertly prepares fragrant nasi lemak with coconut\u2011steamed rice, fiery sambal made from belacan and chilies, tender beef rendang simmered with lemongrass, galangal and kaffir\u2011lime leaves, and delicate kuih lapis layered with pandan\u2011infused batter, which she proudly serves at gatherings.", "persona": "Rashillah Binte Kadir is a methodical yet warm\u2011hearted homemaker who hoards handwritten recipe cards in a kitchen drawer, worries constantly about her grandchildren\u2019s tuition fees, forgets to take her evening vitamins, and insists on reheating leftovers exactly three minutes in the microwave.", "cultural_background": "Rashillah was raised in a traditional Malay household in Singapore\u2019s eastern region, where Bahasa Melayu was spoken at home and customs such as Hari Raya Aidilfitri, Hari Raya Aidiladha, and the communal spirit of gotong\u2011royong shaped her upbringing. She regularly participates in Dikir Barat performances, silat demonstrations, and kampong-style gatherings with neighbours. Family ties with relatives in Malaysia are strong, and she often travels to Johor and Kelantan during festive seasons to maintain cultural connections.", "skills_and_expertise": "Rashillah excels at household management, overseeing budgeting, meal planning, and cooking traditional Malay cuisine. She is skilled in organizing family and community events, coordinating volunteers for mosque activities, and facilitating religious study groups for women. Her digital literacy includes effective use of WhatsApp and Facebook for community communication. She also possesses basic first\u2011aid knowledge, caregiving abilities for elderly relatives, and can teach traditional crafts such as batik and songket.", "skills_and_expertise_list": "['Household budgeting', 'Traditional Malay cooking', 'Meal planning', 'Event organization', 'Community volunteer coordination', 'Digital communication (WhatsApp, Facebook)', 'Basic first aid', 'Caregiving for elderly', 'Religious study facilitation', 'Traditional craft instruction (batik, songket)']", "hobbies_and_interests": "Rashillah enjoys cooking and sharing traditional Malay dishes, gardening herbs and vegetables, attending women\u2019s prayer circles and study groups, volunteering at community events, watching classic Malay TV dramas and films, reading Malay literature and religious books, practicing batik painting, and planning family reunions. She also likes exploring halal\u2011friendly caf\u00e9s and researching travel destinations that align with her faith.", "hobbies_and_interests_list": "['Traditional Malay cooking', 'Gardening', \"Women's prayer circles\", 'Community volunteering', 'Watching classic Malay TV dramas', 'Reading Malay literature', 'Batik painting', 'Planning family gatherings', 'Halal travel research', 'Journaling']", "career_goals_and_ambitions": "While her primary role is homemaker, Rashillah aspires to take on a formal leadership position within her mosque\u2019s women\u2019s committee and become a certified religious instructor for women. She aims to launch a small home\u2011based catering service specializing in halal Malay dishes to supplement family income, and to mentor younger mothers in household and religious practices. Ensuring financial security for her family and supporting her grandchildren\u2019s education remain long\u2011term priorities.", "sex": "Female", "age": 62, "marital_status": "Married", "education_level": "Post Secondary (Non-Tertiary)", "occupation": "Homemaker", "industry": null, "planning_area": "Tampines", "country": "Singapore"}, {"uuid": "a7a3cb6285c44447adff3dd23c09c641", "professional_persona": "Nur Rohani Sanat, a seasoned home\u2011management veteran, leverages her budgeting savvy, adept use of WhatsApp and Facebook groups, and love for flexible planning to coordinate mosque functions, neighbourhood potlucks, and cultural workshops, keeping community spirit alive in Yishun.", "sports_persona": "Nur Rohani Sanat enjoys occasional wakeboarding at East Coast\u2019s water sports centre, walks briskly with friends through Yishun Park, and avidly follows the Lion City Sailors and English Premier League for a lively dose of football excitement.", "arts_persona": "Nur Rohani Sanat expresses creativity through painting batik designs, singing Siti\u202fNurhaliza\u2019s classics at community karaoke nights, and joining zapin dance gatherings that celebrate rhythmic storytelling.", "travel_persona": "Nur Rohani Sanat, after completing the Hajj, looks forward to pilgrimages to historic sites in Saudi Arabia and Jordan, while also cherishing short family trips to Malaysia\u2019s kampong towns, preferring organized group tours that blend spiritual reflection with social bonding.", "culinary_persona": "Nur Rohani Sanat delights in reimagining classic Malay dishes like nasi lemak, beef rendang, and laksa by adding kaffir\u2011lime zest or quinoa, curates halal hawker favourites such as satay and mee rebus for potluck gatherings, and meticulously records each experiment in a personal recipe booklet.", "persona": "Nur Rohani Sanat is a lively 62\u2011year\u2011old community champion who fuses traditional celebrations with a curiosity for new flavours and wakeboarding, yet habitually misplaces her grocery list and forgets to mute her phone during karaoke.", "cultural_background": "Nur Rohani is a Malay Singaporean who grew up in Yishun's close\u2011knit neighbourhood, raised in a kampong\u2011spirited household that values adat, communal celebrations such as Hari Raya, and strong ties with relatives in Malaysia, often visiting for balik kampung trips. She participates in local Malay cultural activities like zapin dance gatherings and batik workshops, blending traditional heritage with Singapore\u2019s multicultural environment.", "skills_and_expertise": "A seasoned home manager skilled in preparing traditional Malay dishes, budgeting household expenses, and caregiving. Experienced organiser of mosque and neighbourhood events, adept at using WhatsApp and Facebook groups for coordination. Proficient in batik and songket weaving, enjoys karaoke singing, and tells stories to children during family gatherings.", "skills_and_expertise_list": "['Traditional Malay cooking', 'Home management', 'Budgeting and finance for household', 'Community event organisation', 'Basic digital communication (WhatsApp, Facebook)', 'Batik and songket weaving', 'Karaoke singing', 'Storytelling for children']", "hobbies_and_interests": "Experimenting with new twists on classic Malay recipes, listening to Siti Nurhaliza's music, joining community karaoke nights, painting batik designs, participating in a local book club that explores folklore and spiritual texts, walking with friends in Yishun Park, gardening, organising neighbourhood potluck gatherings, watching art and history documentaries, and sketching simple doodles inspired by nature.", "hobbies_and_interests_list": "['Cooking experimental Malay dishes', \"Listening to Siti Nurhaliza's music\", 'Karaoke sessions', 'Batik painting', 'Book clubs on folklore and spirituality', 'Group walks in Yishun Park', 'Gardening', 'Organising community potlucks', 'Watching documentaries on art and history', 'Simple sketching/doodling']", "career_goals_and_ambitions": "She aims to deepen her community impact by mentoring younger women in cooking and crafts, documenting family recipes in a small booklet, and leading a weekly halaqah for seniors at the mosque. She also wishes to learn basic computer skills to start a simple blog sharing her culinary and cultural heritage, and plans future religious trips to holy sites in Saudi Arabia and Jordan.", "sex": "Female", "age": 62, "marital_status": "Married", "education_level": "Primary", "occupation": "Homemaker", "industry": null, "planning_area": "Yishun", "country": "Singapore"}, {"uuid": "d9b9878c96e24231b393c9f79c1bf297", "professional_persona": "Xinyi Yoke Wong, known as Cara, is an aspiring brand strategist who blends rigorous research and data visualization with creative storytelling, leveraging her bilingual fluency, event\u2011coordination savvy and Canva\u2011crafted graphics to design data\u2011driven campaigns, while her competitive drive propels her toward Google Analytics and Facebook Blueprint certifications and pushes her to out\u2011perform peers in fast\u2011paced digital marketing projects.", "sports_persona": "Xinyi Yoke Wong is a CrossFit enthusiast who powers through WODs at her neighbourhood gym, joins weekend badminton matches at the community centre, roots for the Singapore national football team\u2014the Lions\u2014and follows the NBA\u2019s Golden State Warriors and Japan\u2019s Yomiuri Giants for a blend of local pride and international excitement.", "arts_persona": "Xinyi Yoke Wong expresses her artistic side by digital sketching inspired by Jackson Wang\u2019s bold aesthetics, curating indie Singaporean playlists alongside the latest K\u2011pop hits, and attending pop concerts that fuse high\u2011energy performance with visual storytelling, all of which fuel her personal brand narrative.", "travel_persona": "Xinyi Yoke Wong plans her travel around the fleeting Japanese cherry blossom season, meticulously mapping routes to iconic hanami spots like Maruyama Park while slipping in hidden caf\u00e9s for latte art, balancing her photography hobby with a modest budget and a preference for group trips that allow her to capture both the spectacle and the intimate moments.", "culinary_persona": "Xinyi Yoke Wong is a devoted food\u2011tourist who devours Singapore hawker staples such as chicken rice, char kway teow, and satay, indulges in Japanese ramen with pork\u2011bone broth and Korean bibimbap featuring gochujang, treats herself to mooncakes and egg tarts during Mid\u2011Autumn, yet her cooking skill is limited to quick stir\u2011fry experiments, often ordering takeout while secretly hoarding the receipt of every new stall she visits.", "persona": "Xinyi Yoke Wong, 23, chases brand\u2011building brilliance by day, karaoke duets and moon\u2011cake cravings by night, meticulously double\u2011checks every spreadsheet until sunrise, and can\u2019t resist a late\u2011night urge to snap a photo of every street\u2011food stall she passes.", "cultural_background": "Xinyi is a 23\u2011year\u2011old Singaporean Chinese raised in Serangoon. She grew up in a bilingual household where Mandarin and English were spoken interchangeably. Family gatherings often feature traditional Chinese festivals such as Lunar New Year and Mid\u2011Autumn, with customs like red packets, moon\u2011cake sharing, and ancestral worship. Her parents emphasize academic achievement and communal values, while also encouraging participation in contemporary Singaporean culture, from hawker centre outings to local music scenes. Living in a multicultural district, she interacts with peers from various backgrounds, which broadens her perspective on identity and community.", "skills_and_expertise": "Xinyi has honed strong research and analytical abilities through her university coursework, complemented by practical experience in digital content creation. She is proficient in social media marketing tools, graphic design basics using Canva, and data visualization in Excel. Her bilingual fluency (Mandarin and English) enables effective communication across diverse audiences. She also excels in event coordination, having organized several campus activities, and possesses solid public\u2011speaking confidence from debate club participation.", "skills_and_expertise_list": "['Research', 'Data analysis', 'Social media marketing', 'Graphic design (Canva)', 'Event coordination', 'Public speaking', 'Bilingual communication (Mandarin, English)', 'Time management']", "hobbies_and_interests": "When she\u2019s not studying, Xinyi enjoys group\u2011centric hobbies such as caf\u00e9 hopping with friends, weekend badminton matches, and karaoke nights. She is an avid food\u2011tourist, seeking out hawker stalls and street\u2011food vendors for both local and international flavors. To balance her competitive nature, she practices yoga and mindfulness meditation. She also follows contemporary music trends, especially K\u2011pop and Singaporean indie artists, and captures her experiences through travel photography. Participation in the campus debate club satisfies her curiosity for new ideas, while occasional sketching on a digital tablet lets her experiment with visual expression.", "hobbies_and_interests_list": "['Caf\u00e9 hopping', 'Badminton', 'Karaoke', 'Food tourism', 'Yoga and meditation', 'Travel photography', 'Debate club', 'Digital sketching', 'Music streaming (K\u2011pop, indie)']", "career_goals_and_ambitions": "Xinyi aspires to launch a career in brand strategy and digital marketing within the consumer\u2011goods or tech sector. She aims to secure a graduate trainee programme at a multinational firm, where she can blend data\u2011driven insights with creative storytelling. In the longer term, she envisions leading a cross\u2011functional team that develops innovative campaigns, leveraging emerging media formats. Her competitive drive pushes her to obtain relevant certifications (e.g., Google Analytics, Facebook Blueprint) and build a strong portfolio of campaign case studies.", "sex": "Female", "age": 23, "marital_status": "Single", "education_level": "University", "occupation": "Student", "industry": null, "planning_area": "Serangoon", "country": "Singapore"}, {"uuid": "066eeb0e0b3b4a6b99264f5c29381289", "professional_persona": "Jia Ka Poh, also known as Candice, is a 27\u2011year\u2011old aspiring digital marketing coordinator who blends her communications background, bilingual fluency in English and Mandarin, and savvy with Instagram, TikTok and Facebook analytics with a sociable, flexible, and occasionally disorganised style to craft engaging brand stories and lead collaborative projects.", "sports_persona": "Jia Ka Poh, aka Candice, passionately follows FC Barcelona\u2019s matches on weekends, while maintaining her own fitness through flexible badminton sessions at the Bishan community centre, preferring spontaneous play over rigid training schedules.", "arts_persona": "Jia Ka Poh, known as Candice, immerses herself in K\u2011pop culture by streaming BTS videos, collecting their limited\u2011edition merchandise, and channeling that creative energy into karaoke nights and Instagram food\u2011photography projects that blend visual storytelling with pop\u2011music aesthetics.", "travel_persona": "Jia Ka Poh, also called Candice, dreams of a flexible K\u2011pop pilgrimage to South Korea, meticulously curating a list of Seoul\u2019s music landmarks, fan caf\u00e9s and street\u2011food stalls while budgeting her trips to balance immersive experiences with her love for spontaneous caf\u00e9 discoveries.", "culinary_persona": "Jia Ka Poh, aka Candice, delights in wandering hawker centres for dishes like char kway teow, chicken rice and durian ice cream, occasionally recreates home\u2011cooked stir\u2011fried noodles and soy\u2011braised pork at her kitchen, while documenting each bite on Instagram and pairing meals with bubble tea or Korean bibimbap on her culinary adventures.", "persona": "Jia Ka Poh, known as Candice, is a socially\u2011charged, K\u2011pop\u2011obsessed digital marketer who habitually forgets to set reminders for deadlines, stays up binge\u2011watching Korean dramas, compulsively checks her phone for new BTS releases, and finds calm by lighting incense and meditating whenever work stress spikes.", "cultural_background": "Candice grew up in Bishan, a mature residential town in Singapore, in a Chinese\u2011Singaporean family that blends traditional Chinese customs with the multicultural fabric of the city\u2011state. Her household observes Lunar New Year, Qingming, and the Mid\u2011Autumn Festival, enjoys Chinese home\u2011cooked meals, and maintains close ties with extended relatives. She speaks Mandarin at home, English at school, and uses Singlish in daily interactions, reflecting the linguistic diversity of Singaporean Chinese.", "skills_and_expertise": "Candice holds a university degree in communications and has developed practical skills in digital marketing, social media management, content creation, basic graphic design, event coordination, and customer service. She is fluent in English and Mandarin, comfortable with Instagram, TikTok, and Facebook analytics, and adept at teamwork, public speaking, and research.", "skills_and_expertise_list": "['Digital marketing', 'Social media management', 'Content creation', 'Basic graphic design', 'Event coordination', 'Customer service', 'English communication', 'Mandarin proficiency', 'Team collaboration', 'Research and analysis']", "hobbies_and_interests": "She enjoys group\u2011oriented activities such as weekend karaoke sessions, playing badminton at the community centre, and exploring new caf\u00e9s and hawker stalls with friends. As an avid K\u2011pop fan, she follows BTS, watches Korean dramas, and collects merchandise. She also photographs street food, shares food\u2011blog posts on Instagram, volunteers at local charity events, practices short meditation sessions, and attends beginner yoga classes to manage stress.", "hobbies_and_interests_list": "['K-pop fandom', 'Korean drama watching', 'Caf\u00e9 hopping', 'Food blogging', 'Photography', 'Badminton', 'Karaoke with friends', 'Travel planning', 'Meditation', 'Volunteering at community centres', 'DIY crafts', 'Yoga']", "career_goals_and_ambitions": "Candice aims to secure a full\u2011time role as a digital marketing coordinator or community manager within the next year, leveraging her creativity and people\u2011skills to grow brand engagement. In the medium term she wants to deepen her data\u2011analysis capabilities and lead larger campaigns, and eventually transition into a senior marketing position or launch a social\u2011impact initiative that promotes mental\u2011well\u2011being for young adults while maintaining work\u2011life balance.", "sex": "Female", "age": 27, "marital_status": "Single", "education_level": "University", "occupation": "Unemployed", "industry": null, "planning_area": "Bishan", "country": "Singapore"}]
